name: Flip Words
summary: A dynamic text animation component that flips words vertically like a slot machine or flip-clock, creating engaging headline transitions that cycle through multiple terms or messages.
detailedDescription: The Flip Words component creates eye-catching text animations where words flip vertically to reveal new terms, similar to classic flip-clocks or slot machine reels. This effect is perfect for headlines that want to communicate multiple related concepts, value propositions, or keywords in a compact, engaging format. Each word flip is a smooth 3D rotation around the X-axis, with careful timing that creates a satisfying mechanical feel. The component can cycle through an array of words automatically at set intervals, or trigger flips on specific events. Visual polish includes proper perspective for 3D effect, shadow hints during flip motion, and smooth easing curves that feel weighty and deliberate. The animation can flip single words or multiple words simultaneously for more dramatic effect. Perfect for hero headlines, value proposition sections, tagline rotators, or any context where communicating multiple concepts through animated text enhances the message. The effect creates movement that draws attention while the compact format saves space compared to displaying all words statically.
purpose: Create engaging headline animations flipping through multiple words
Communicate multiple concepts or value propositions compactly
Draw attention to key messaging through dynamic motion
Save space compared to static multi-word displays
Add satisfying mechanical feel through 3D flip animations
behavior: Animates words with vertical 3D flip rotation around X-axis
Cycles through word arrays at configurable intervals
Triggers flips automatically or on specific events
Applies proper perspective for convincing 3D effect
Uses smooth easing curves creating weighty, deliberate motion
Supports single or multiple simultaneous word flips
Maintains text accessibility with semantic structure
visualCharacteristics: Vertical 3D flip animation resembling flip-clock or slots
Mechanical, satisfying motion with weighty feel
Compact format cycling through multiple terms
Smooth, polished transitions with proper perspective
recommendations: Use where moderate motion and reusable composition improve UX and clarity.
